sourceAuthority: non-authoritative evidence snapshot; does not promote Maintainability Graph or replace tree-native operational source
createdFor: Actual Representative Runtime Feasibility Demo evidence strengthening
derivationNotes: Project nodes are manually derived from confirmed Product node PT-SEARCH-001 and Work node WT-SEARCH-001.
Boundaries use expectedFiles and forbiddenFiles from work-tree.json.
This file strengthens Product -> Project -> Work traceability for the representative demo only.
limitations: This is not generated by the CLI.
This is not a runtime source promotion.
It does not prove the actual Todo app file structure exists outside the illustrative slice.
It does not add architecture beyond the title-only search slice.

nodes.title: Todo search adoption project boundary
nodes.responsibility: Group the project boundaries needed for the selected Todo title-search slice.
boundaries: Existing Todo app adoption is limited to title-only search behavior for this slice.
risks: Existing project structure is illustrative; no live repository files were inspected for this demo.

nodes.title: Todo list search surface
nodes.responsibility: Own the Todo list UI surface where the search query filters visible Todo titles.
risks: Note/description search is outside current selected scope until Product Patch PP-001 is confirmed.

nodes.title: Todo title search helper
nodes.responsibility: Own title-only query matching behavior for the selected slice.
forbiddenBoundaries: note/description search before Product Patch confirmation
risks: This helper becomes stale or partial if PP-001 is confirmed and search target expands to notes.
